summary.zh-CN: 流式阅读位置更加稳定，移动端应用入口与定点文件预览也更顺手。
summary.en-US: Streaming reading positions are more stable, with easier mobile app access and complete targeted file previews.

body.zh-CN: 移动端底部导航可以直接浏览并打开面板应用。
body.en-US: Mobile bottom navigation can now browse and open panel apps directly.

title.zh-CN: 流式回复不再抢回滚动位置
title.en-US: Streaming replies no longer reclaim scroll position

body.zh-CN: 向上滚动超过 10px 后会持续保持当前位置，消息继续增高也不会重新拉回底部。
body.en-US: After scrolling more than 10 px upward, the reading position remains escaped as the message grows.

title.zh-CN: 定点文件预览保留完整内容

body.zh-CN: 带行号打开未超过上限的文本或 Markdown 文件时，会显示完整文件并定位到目标行。
body.en-US: Opening a text or Markdown file at a specific line keeps the complete file when it is below the preview limit.

body.zh-CN: 现有 NPM 安装可以直接通过 stable 通道升级，不需要迁移配置、会话或文件。
body.en-US: Existing npm installations can update through the stable channel without migrating configuration, sessions, or files.
